query:
SELECT u.name, u.username, edp.businessDate,
       edp.totalPoints AS dailyTotalPoints,
       COALESCE(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 0) AS detailTotalPoints,
       COUNT(psd.id) AS detailCount,
       ROUND((edp.totalPoints - COALESCE(SUM(psd.earnedPoints), 0)), 6) AS diffPoints
FROM engineer_daily_productivity edp
JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd
  ON psd.userId = edp.userId AND psd.businessDate = edp.businessDate
WHERE edp.businessDate = '2026-05-08'
  AND (u.username IN ('geng03','ying43') OR u.name IN ('жЎ”жў—йЃ”ж›ј','дЅіз©Ћ'))
GROUP BY u.name, u.username, edp.businessDate, edp.totalPoints
ORDER BY u.name;

JOIN users u ON u.id = edp.userId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd
